name: This World
description:
WIP fantasy world, there's a general structure with two main continents and a bunch of islands. there's supposed to be 3 currencies too, idk if it'll work. proxy is on if it helps but idk how to make lorebooks so there's that.

there are various territories and species as well as big cavern dungeon thing.

there's no magic system in place yet, you can probably do whatever you want for now

upd15: cleared update board just because, lorebooks, a bunch of them, probably unnecessarily many, could probably merge them but meh, the bot itself now only includes a general overview, fixes, Munderia update, map is currently slightly outdated
